question: Talking about Caster, which of the following statement is incorrect?
options: Caster is the tilt of steering axis toward the front or rear of the vehicle.
Caster has a value of 1 to 7 degrees.
Caster and Caster trail maintain directional stability and control.
Caster can not increase steering returnability.
answer: Caster can not increase steering returnability.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest.

question: Talking about Toe, which of the following statement is incorrect?
options: Toe in, Toe out are generally called Toe.
Toe has the value of 1 to 5 mm.
Positive toe (Toe in) is used for wheel has positive Camber.
Toe is used only for steerable wheel.
answer: Toe is used only for steerable wheel.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest.

question: Talking about Camber, which of the following statement is incorrect?
options: Camber is the inward or outward tilt of a wheel from the vertical when viewed from the front of the vehicle.
Camber can be negative or positive within 1 degree.
Normally, truck has negative camber and passenger car has positive camber.
The purpose of setting camber is to make wheels are perpendicular to the road surface and provide good traction.
answer: Normally, truck has negative camber and passenger car has positive camber.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest.

question: Talking about Kingpin, which of following statement is incorrect?
options: Kingpin is the inward tilt of steering axis from the vertical as viewed from the front of the vehicle.
Kingpin usually has value of 6 to 15 degrees.
Kingpin can not make steering wheel returnability.
Kingpin reduces steering effort, especially if the vehicle is not moving.
answer: Kingpin can not make steering wheel returnability.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest.
